overall.description: A cinematic scene from a video game (Hogwarts Legacy) depicting the interior of Ollivanders wand shop. The player character in green Slytherin robes stands observing the elderly shopkeeper with a long braided beard as he handles wands and ledgers behind a wooden counter in the dimly lit, cluttered shop filled with towering shelves of wand boxes.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow wand shop with floor-to-ceiling shelving

events.description: camera slowly pans left to reveal more of the left-side shelving filled with wand boxes

agents.ego_description: standing still in green robes, watching the shopkeeper's actions behind the counter

notable_agents.action: elderly shopkeeper with long braided beard handling a ledger book, gesturing with hands, and interacting with items on the counter

entered.detail: floor-to-ceiling dark wooden shelving units packed with wand boxes and various items
tall wooden shelving with stacked boxes and shop items reaching to the ceiling
single warm glowing light bulb hanging from the ceiling providing primary illumination
dark wooden shop counter separating the shopkeeper from the customer area
tall cylindrical metal cage structure with vertical bars visible behind the shopkeeper

segments.scene_description: The scene takes place entirely within a narrow, dimly lit wand shop with warm artificial lighting from a hanging bulb. The player character stands observing an elderly shopkeeper with a distinctive long braided beard who is actively handling a ledger and gesturing behind a wooden counter. The camera remains mostly stationary with a slight leftward pan around the 15-second mark, revealing more of the towering wooden shelves filled with wand boxes that line the walls.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a steady observation of a cluttered wand shop that gradually reveals the immense scale of its inventory. It begins with a focused view of an elderly shopkeeper with a long braided beard as he gestures and handles a ledger behind a wooden counter. As the player character stands observing in the dim, warm light of a hanging bulb, the camera remains mostly stationary to establish the intimate atmosphere of the encounter. The scene then shifts with a slight leftward pan, expanding the field of view to uncover the towering wooden shelves packed with wand boxes that line the walls.
